plot outline: A group of teens including Cindy Campbell (Anna Faris) and Brenda Meeks (Regina Hall) are invited to spend a night in Hell House. Professor Oldman (Tim Curry) has convinced them it is for a school project, but the night won't go past quietly. Master Kane (Richard Moll) is long dead, but still plans on enjoying himself, especially with Alex Monday (Tori Spelling). When things really start getting bad, the gang must work together to find a way to capture this ghostly menace.
title: Scary Movie 2
akas: The Most 'New' Screaming Plan (Japan, English title)
Scary Movie 2 - Um Susto de Filme (Portugal)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
